embed.alt: A surreal landscape features a multitude of women legs, varying in skin tone from light to dark, upright and extending skyward in nylons from a carpet of lush green moss. A rustic wooden cabin is nestled in the center, its windows illuminated with a warm orange glow and a vibrant pink neon heart sign glowing above the front door. A crescent moon shines brightly, casting a soft light on the bizarre scene. The legs, seemingly rooted in the moss, create an abstract forest, revealing a surreal dreamlike quality. The legs move slowly, smoothly, and evenly at the toes, feet, and knees, much like the tentacles of sea anemones in an ocean current. The thighs, however, remain firmly planted where they emerge from the ground. The camera slowly pans towards the door of the cabin. A man wearing a clown mask, a wig with messy red hair, and a white lab coat with bright red stains on it, comes out of the door and runs towards the spectator with a sparks spitting chainsaw in his right hand. THE END
